title: Sculk awaits
body:
Sculks awaits is a bio-technical datapack adding sculk machinery such as _Network_, _Forge_, _Generator_ and a few more!
**Recipes**:

_Forge_: gold ingot - sculk steel

.
_Obelisk_: sculk + _1000_ EN = Cocoon
sculk trap + _1000_ EN = Devourer
callibrated sculk sensor + _800_ EN = Generator
sculk shrieker + _500_ EN = sculk trap
sculk forge + _1500_ EN = sculk weaponry
echo shard - amethyst shard - _300_ EN
.
_Weaponry_: **exactly** 5 sculk steel ingots + 2 sculk catalyst + 10 soul sand + 1 diamond sword = _Sculker sword_
**exactly** 5 sculk steel ingots + 2 sculk catalyst + 10 soul sand + 1 diamond hoe = _Sculk scythe_
Network, Forge and Remover are crafted on crafting table

P.S: _EN_ is _Obelisk_ energy generated by sculk Generators, all sculk machinery are placed on sculk veins, but sculk _weaponry_, being placed on sculk _Cocoons_
